title: Feels Like Hope
desc: As the college fest approaches, Avi and Lakshay are teamed up together which leads to worse consequences for the two of them. Gandhi goes on a journey to find a new passion by participating in the fest, and Sameer pushes himself to face his fear of performing at the fest.

title: The Age of Innocence
desc: Ruhi needs a new phone and a scholarship, but also wants Lucky’s attention. Kenny wants to stand up for his rights but desperately needs help for the same.

title: The Call of the Wild
desc: Ruhi has second thoughts about her choices. Ayesha needs a story at any cost. Aparna is looking for payback. Meanwhile, Aditya makes some progress with the investigation.

title: Great Expectations
desc: Bhati and Gagan face off in a surprisingly close-fought election. Ruhi has a close shave in an outstation exam. Tarush suffers a setback.

title: Brave New World
desc: Ruhi gets a taste of the good life, briefly, before the shit hits the fan. Tarush takes matters into his own hands. Aparna needs to regain control of her show. Bijoy smells a rat.

title: Vanity Fair
desc: Bhati overcommits to a sponsor and faces a logistical nightmare. Tarush follows the breadcrumbs. Everyone crosses paths at the college festival. Well, almost.

title: The Lord of the Flies
desc: Ayesha looks for missing books. Bijoy starts putting things together. Lucky finds himself in trouble. But Nadeem has bigger fish to fry.

title: The Return of the Native
desc: Lucky comforts a guilt-ridden Ruhi. Aarti makes a shocking discovery. Ayesha takes a trip. Bhati faces unexpected resistance. Gagan opens Aparna’s eyes.

title: Bengaluru Hilaa Denge
desc: Pradeep Bhaiyya, an annoying cousin shows up and takes Akhil and Rinzing for a drunken night. Kay sees Aryan making out. Vasudha, frustrated with her subtly sexist boss, heads out to a new age experience and hooks up with a much younger flute player.

title: Braaazilll!!
desc: Vasudha finally manages to have sex. Akhil is struggling to find his groove at the office, ends up meeting an unconventionally attractive girl, and is blown away. By the end, both Vasu and Akhil confront some seriously painful realities of their lives.

title: Waise Wale Bhai Behen
desc: Vasudha and Akhil forget to tie rakhis to each other on Raksha Bandhan. Vasudha loses her patience with her boss Satvik and impulsively resigns from Proficient. Akhil meets a bizarre therapist. He also finds an unlikely yet intriguing match on Kechup.

title: No Way Up
desc: Characters from different backgrounds are thrown together when the plane they're travelling on crashes into the Pacific Ocean. A nightmare fight for survival ensues with the air supply running out and dangers creeping in from all sides.

title: Boy Kills World
desc: A fever dream action film that follows Boy, a deaf person with a vibrant imagination. When his family is murdered, he is trained by a mysterious shaman to repress his childish imagination and become an instrument of death.

title: Feels Like Family
desc: The boys are at Lakshay's family home for his sister's wedding. As Avi and Gandhi gear up to get lucky, Sameer has a significant revelation. Lakshay, meanwhile, feels out of the loop with his own family, as he feels replaced by his nemesis John. The wedding weekend rages with the promise of chaos and drama.

title: Sense The VIbe Bro!
desc: Avi and Meera come to visit Riya and Varun. But they arrive having had a fight. What starts off as an awkward situation turns into a nightmare for our exes.

title: You Guys Are Couple Goals
desc: Then - You see a hint of jealousy in Riya and Varun's relationship when they were still together. Now - Riya and Varun are "trying" to date other people(while they live together) with hilarious consequences.

title: Mera Spondylitis Phoot Gaya!
desc: An unfortunate accident leads to Riya and Varun realizing the small ways in which their relationship has changed since they were together.

title: Bhen-dad!
desc: A surprise visit from Riya's dad sends Riya, Varun, and Devika in disarray as they have to scramble to make sure he doesn't find out Riya and Varun are not a couple anymore.

title: Mamla Gehra Hai
desc: Riya and Varun are forced to make tough decisions about their future together in the house. To add to their woes, a burglary at the house leaves them deprived of a special possession.

title: Naye Armaan
desc: Varun turns 30, and Ria is introduced to Anisha. Back in the day, Varun and Ria finally move into a house together.

title: Humesha
desc: Ria decides to go home and tell her parents the truth about Varun and Ria's breakup. Back in the day, Varun and Ria's parents come over as the families meet and make plans for their future.

title: Khwaab
desc: Ria finally admits to having feelings for Varun. Back in the day, we see trouble in Varun and Ria's relationship for the first time.

title: Tanha
desc: Ria starts to look for new houses. Back in the day, Ria and Varun are still dealing with their broken trust, and everything changes.

title: Darmaan
desc: Varun and Ria break up.

title: Hum
desc: Varun and Ria try and make their relationship work.

title: Feels Like Responsibility
desc: As Avi and Lakshay prepare for their "first second house party", Avi's dad decides to drop in for a surprise visit. Meanwhile, Sameer tries to think of different ways to get his unwanted roommate Gandhi to shift to the living room instead. Will their first second party go as planned?

title: Feels Like Give and Take
desc: After weeks of witnessing the boys make a mess of Bancchod Niwas, Sameer tells them to clean up their act. Lakshay's solution is? Get a housekeeper. Meanwhile, Avi, still reeling from his breakup with Mahima, decides to make a "grand gesture", which also inspires Lakshay to get another quirky roommate.

title: Feels Like Summer
desc: As the Delhi heat rises in full force, tempers rise with it. Sameer tries to push himself to perform his poetry for an audience that isn't Lloyd, while Avi tries to drown his sorrows by pretending like he's completely fine. Tensions implode and so do Gandhi's... special parts.

title: Feels Like Finding Yourself
desc: Avi has the greatest plan (his words) to move on and spend time with himself - an Imtiaz Ali-themed tour of Delhi. What could go wrong? Meanwhile, Gandhi's first day of cricket practice doesn't quite go as planned, and Lakshay meets an unexpected acquaintance.

title: Feels Like Family
desc: The boys are at Lakshay's family home for his sister's wedding. As Avi and Gandhi gear up to get lucky, Sameer has a significant revelation. Lakshay, meanwhile, feels out of the loop with his own family, as he feels replaced by his nemesis John. The wedding weekend rages with the promise of chaos and drama.

title: Feels Like Choices
desc: The exam results of last semester are out and Avi's is less than perfect. Afraid to let his dad find out in case he is called back home, Avi cooks up a drastic plan with the help of Sameer and Gandhi. Meanwhile, Lakshay hosts a Fresher's party, where he comes to point of no return. Will the boys make the right choices?

title: No Way Up
desc: Characters from different backgrounds are thrown together when the plane they're travelling on crashes into the Pacific Ocean. A nightmare fight for survival ensues with the air supply running out and dangers creeping in from all sides.

title: Boy Kills World
desc: A fever dream action film that follows Boy, a deaf person with a vibrant imagination. When his family is murdered, he is trained by a mysterious shaman to repress his childish imagination and become an instrument of death.

title: Feels Like Fixing Yourself
desc: Gandhi having been injured at the end of season 1, is still grappling with not making it to the tryouts. But the problem may not be physical as much as it is mental. As the boys try their own methods to help Gandhi feel better, Lakshay tries to figure out ways to tell Avi about Mahima. Will the boys be successful in helping Gandhi heal?

title: Feels Like Fear
desc: Sameer's 20th birthday approaches and he realises that he isn't even close to achieving his goals in life. To help find answers, he calls Vicky Paaji to try a new drug called "Kadak Chai". The boys and Vicky Paaji take the chai together and go on different trips and face their fears of unintended consequences.

title: Feels Like Rock Bottom
desc: A single-take episode right after the events of the party where Avi finds out about Lakshay and Mahima, a fight breaks out between the boys as they deal with their own fears and the problems they have with each other. Will this be the end of their friendship?

title: Feels Like Acceptance
desc: Tensions in the house are at an all-time high. In the middle of this, Vicky Paaji comes home unannounced and starts to stay with the boys. The boys must now team up to kick Vicky Paaji out.

title: The Age of Innocence
desc: Ruhi needs a new phone and a scholarship, but also wants Lucky’s attention. Kenny wants to stand up for his rights but desperately needs help for the same.

title: The Call of the Wild
desc: Ruhi has second thoughts about her choices. Ayesha needs a story at any cost. Aparna is looking for payback. Meanwhile, Aditya makes some progress with the investigation.

title: Great Expectations
desc: Bhati and Gagan face off in a surprisingly close-fought election. Ruhi has a close shave in an outstation exam. Tarush suffers a setback.

title: Brave New World
desc: Ruhi gets a taste of the good life, briefly, before the shit hits the fan. Tarush takes matters into his own hands. Aparna needs to regain control of her show. Bijoy smells a rat.

title: Vanity Fair
desc: Bhati overcommits to a sponsor and faces a logistical nightmare. Tarush follows the breadcrumbs. Everyone crosses paths at the college festival. Well, almost.

title: The Lord of the Flies
desc: Ayesha looks for missing books. Bijoy starts putting things together. Lucky finds himself in trouble. But Nadeem has bigger fish to fry.

title: The Return of the Native
desc: Lucky comforts a guilt-ridden Ruhi. Aarti makes a shocking discovery. Ayesha takes a trip. Bhati faces unexpected resistance. Gagan opens Aparna’s eyes.

title: Catch-22
desc: Bhati’s ambitious game is afoot. Tensions and stakes, both are pretty high. Kenny has an epiphany. Tarush has a breakthrough. Bijoy races against time. Ruhi climbs the ranks.

title: Adjust Maadi
desc: Vasudha is nervous about her first date after her messy separation with Dhruv. Akhil is avoiding going to the office for another week. After a hilarious double-date disaster, Vasudha tries to engage in some guilt-free fun and picks up a guy at a bar.

title: Primal
desc: Frank's caught wildlife in the Brazilian jungle including a 400 lbs. White Jaguar. He ships it on the same ship as an arrested assassin. The assassin breaks free and frees the animals.

title: Rogue
desc: Megan Fox is a battle-hardened mercenary in the wilds of Africa whose team has rescued hostages from a gang of murderous rebels and is trying to survive - against both the rebels and a pack of ravenous lions.

title: Bengaluru Hilaa Denge
desc: Pradeep Bhaiyya, an annoying cousin shows up and takes Akhil and Rinzing for a drunken night. Kay sees Aryan making out. Vasudha, frustrated with her subtly sexist boss, heads out to a new age experience and hooks up with a much younger flute player.
